footer.tagline: Empowering Bhimavaram's technicians with digital unity and smart tools.

landing.heroSubtitle: A unified association portal designed for professional unity, instant communication, and association management.
landing.servicesSubtitle: Professional mobile repair services by expert technicians
landing.goDigitalDesc: Log in to the BCTA Portal and start managing your association with real-time data, QR attendance, and instant notifications.
landing.cameraRepairDesc: Fix blurry photos, camera crashes, and hardware issues with professional front and rear camera repair services.
landing.chargingRepairDesc: Resolve charging issues with precision repair or replacement of charging ports and connectors.
landing.speakerRepairDesc: Fix audio issues including low sound, no sound, or microphone problems for clear communication.
landing.waterDamageDesc: Advanced cleaning and repair solutions for water-damaged devices to restore functionality.
landing.networkRepairDesc: Fix weak signals, no network issues, and SIM detection problems with expert diagnostics.
landing.accessoriesDesc: Wide range of mobile accessories and spare parts available including chargers, cases, and more.
landing.cleaningDesc: Keep your device in top condition with professional internal and external cleaning services.
landing.glassRefurbishDesc: Cost-effective glass replacement without changing the full display using advanced refurbishing technology.

about.title: Bhimavaram Cellphone Technician
about.subtitle: A unified platform bringing together mobile repair technicians in Bhimavaram, fostering collaboration, skill development, and professional growth since 2018.
about.missionDesc: To empower mobile technicians with modern tools, knowledge sharing, and a collaborative platform that enhances service quality and professional standards across Bhimavaram.
about.visionDesc: To become the leading association for mobile repair professionals, setting industry standards and creating opportunities for growth, innovation, and excellence in mobile technology services.
about.joinCommunityDesc: Become part of BCTA and connect with fellow mobile repair professionals

services.title: Professional
services.subtitle: Expert technicians providing quality repair services for all mobile devices
services.screenDesc: Expert screen replacement services for all smartphone brands. We use high-quality original and compatible displays with warranty coverage.
services.batteryDesc: Professional battery replacement for all mobile devices. Restore your phone's battery life with genuine and high-capacity batteries.
services.motherboardDesc: Advanced motherboard-level repairs including IC replacement, reballing, and circuit repair. We fix charging issues, network problems, and boot failures.
services.softwareDesc: Complete software solutions including OS installation, unlocking, data recovery, and virus removal. Keep your device running smoothly.
services.needRepairDesc: Contact BCTA members for reliable and expert mobile repair services

contact.subtitle: Have questions? We'd love to hear from you. Send us a message and we'll respond as soon as possible.
contact.thankYou: Thank you for contacting us! We'll get back to you soon.
contact.urgentMatters: For urgent matters, please login to the member portal or contact us directly

presidents.subtitle: Four leaders. One vision. The dedicated presidents who have shaped BCTA into a thriving community of mobile repair professionals since its founding.
presidents.desc1: Led BCTA through its founding years, establishing the foundation for a strong community of mobile repair technicians. Pioneered the first member registration system and organized initial training workshops.
presidents.desc2: Expanded BCTA's reach across Bhimavaram, introducing quality standards and professional ethics. Launched the first annual technical conference and strengthened member collaboration.
presidents.desc3: Modernized BCTA operations with digital tools and online platforms. Implemented the QR-based attendance system and enhanced member communication channels for better connectivity.
presidents.desc4: Currently leading BCTA towards innovation and excellence. Focusing on skill development programs, industry partnerships, and leveraging technology to empower all members.

memberTools.title: Powerful Tools for
memberTools.subtitle: Access all the features you need, optimized for mobile devices
memberTools.scanQRDesc: Point your phone at the meeting QR. Attendance logged to Firestore in under a second.
memberTools.trackPaymentsDesc: See all product purchases, dues, and payment history. Know exactly what you owe.
memberTools.raiseComplaintsDesc: Submit grievances with photo attachment. Track whether it's open or resolved.
memberTools.emergencyBloodDesc: Search by blood group across all members to find the nearest donor instantly.
memberTools.viewMeetingsDesc: Browse upcoming and past meetings with date, time, location, and GPS link.
memberTools.securityStatusDesc: See your live account status and Member ID. Blocked members lose all access immediately.
memberTools.step1Desc: Use your Member ID and password to login to the portal
memberTools.step2Desc: Access all tools from your member dashboard
memberTools.step3Desc: Scan QR, track payments, raise complaints and more
memberTools.readyToStartDesc: Login to your member account and access all these powerful tools
